situation_read: This is an ownership clarification moment, not a request to absorb coordination work.

content.label: Recommended direction
content.body: Keep the message concise, ask for the owner decision directly, and avoid volunteering to maintain the tracker.

content.label: Draft message
content.body: Morgan, I can send the status note once ownership is clear. Should Jordan own dependency tracking from here, or should I frame it as an open decision for Friday?

content.label: Memory update proposal
content.body: Consider saving a durable preference that Alex wants ownership questions made explicit before taking on coordination work.

content.label: State update proposal
content.body: Track the ExampleCo status note as active until ownership is confirmed or the 2026-06-27 stale-after date passes.

content.label: Public safety note
content.body: All names, organization references, and details are synthetic.

strategy: The response protects helpfulness while making the decision point visible.
tradeoffs: It may slow the note until Morgan clarifies ownership, but it reduces the risk that Alex becomes the default tracker.
recommendation: Use the direct question and keep any follow-up focused on owner, deadline, and next action.
risks: Morgan may still ask Alex to coordinate.
Jordan's role may remain ambiguous after the first reply.
